name: 更好的故障机器人 / Better Defect
author: Codex
description: v103/vPC compatible full build: restores 26 old Defect cards, keeps cross-run strict zero-sum rarity-local dynamic odds and per-card disabled-state persistence, fixes Fission orb visuals, restores the starter Strike -> Ball Lightning replacement, no BaseLib. Encyclopedia-only card disabling, 14 historical card versions and 12 custom card transformations share a persistent 35-point budget. v0.9.1 corrects Tesla Coil and Shatter descriptions and fixes Reprogram+ to keep Focus loss at 1.
